nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 白腹海鵰
nodes.summary: 白腹海鵰（White-bellied sea eagle，学名 Icthyophaga leucogaster），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动、农药污染。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Human disturbance to its habitat is the main threat, both from direct human activity near nests which impacts on breeding success, and from removal of suitable trees for nesting

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The white-bellied sea eagle was one of the more affected species, probably due to its feeding in areas heavily treated with pesticide such as swamps
